forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 53. Northwest wind around 5 mph.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 71. Northwest wind 5 to 9 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

weather_report:
In the stillness of the overnight hours, Boston rests under a gentle veil of partly cloudy skies, the temperature quietly settling around fifty-three degrees. The northwest winds whisper softly, caressing the city with their cool touch. As dawn approaches, a promise of a brighter day emerges, suggesting that the morning light will begin to filter through, revealing the beauty that is Boston. 

As the sun breaks free and the day unfolds, the atmosphere is anticipated to be pleasantly warm with temperatures reaching up to seventy-one. A touch of sunshine will paint the city in hues of gold and green, while the gentle winds continue to sway at a moderate pace. Dress in layers, perhaps a light jacket for the early moments that may linger on the cooler side, but know that as the day continues, short sleeves might be all you need. Consider a stroll along the Charles River or a visit to one of the city’s quiet parks—today is perfect for an unhurried walk, where the remnants of early morning solitude mingle with the vibrancy of a city awakening. Avoid the cliches of busyness; today is about savoring the moment, enjoying the cadence of life in a city that always has more to offer.
